reviews.comment:
Lugar limpio y cómodo. Calefacción. Baños limpios. Correcta atención. Algo negativo: el café.

(Translated by Google)
Clean and comfortable place. Heating. Clean bathrooms. Good service. One negative point: the coffee.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para hacer parada despues de Varios kilometros desde Buenos Aires! Solo unos minutitos de desvío! Vale la pena esta alternativa a las Estaciones Sobre la AutoVia!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop after several kilometers from Buenos Aires! Just a few minutes' detour! This alternative to the stations on the highway is worth it!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrX2R5Z05REAE

reviews.comment:
Ideal parar de Bs as a Córdoba o vice versa... Lugar amplio, con sombra. Apto campers, motorhome. Perfecto para viajeros con mascotas. Desvío de 1,5 klm de la autopista cor ros en el KLM 412 aprox... Es la vieja rn 9 KLM 419.

(Translated by Google)
Ideal stop for travelers between Buenos Aires and Córdoba or vice versa... Spacious, shady spot. Suitable for campers and motorhomes. Perfect for travelers with pets. A 1.5 km detour from the Corros highway at approximately km 412... It's the old Route 9 at km 419.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrbmRpcmNREAE

reviews.comment:
Me encantó el lugar para descansar del largo viaje. Muy tranquilo en medio del campo. Un poco dentro de la ruta pero vale la pena. La atención es excelente! Tiene par a ofrecer recuerdos lindos. Lo recomiendo!

(Translated by Google)
I loved this place to rest after my long trip. Very peaceful in the countryside. It's a little off the main road, but it's worth it. The service is excellent! They have a couple of lovely souvenirs to offer. I highly recommend it!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNrc1BYNDFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ambiente super cálido, con gente muy buena atendiendo. Parada obligatoria de camino a Córdoba.

(Translated by Google)
Super friendly atmosphere, with excellent service. A must-stop on the way to Córdoba.

reviews.comment:
Una lastima que no lo dejen mudarse a la nueva autopista, por esa causa queda un poco trasmano para los socios, entrar al pueblo 4km, dicen que es muy caro el Canon que les cobra la Provincia....

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame they won't let them move to the new highway; because of that, it's a bit out of the way for the members, entering the town is 4km away. They say the fee charged by the Province is very expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZOThyemdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy linda estación de servicios. Prestar atención en la entrada, ya que las señalizaciones estan ya en el lugar y el acceso un poco peligroso. (Piedras tipo ripio grandes).

(Translated by Google)
Very nice service station. Pay attention at the entrance, as the signs are already in place and the access is a bit dangerous (large gravel-like stones).
